title: Prior-only tyre-cliff trend
summary: Compute recent pace and degradation trends using only previous laps to detect accelerating tyre decline.
rationale: Rolling trend variants were lower and more fragile than finish-window features, but the underlying tyre-cliff mechanism is plausible. A compact prior-only version may add complementary signal.
implementation_hint: Within each race-driver sequence, compute shifted rolling means, exponentially weighted means, volatility, and simple slopes for `LapTime_Delta` and `Cumulative_Degradation` over short windows. Shift before rolling so the current row does not include future observations.
expected_effect: Small ROC AUC gain with low-medium confidence.
risk: Rolling features were relatively unstable and can be noisy on short stints; keep windows short and fill early-lap values safely.
